text:
Thanks,

Please commit it.

On Tue, Oct 28, 2008 at 06:50:17PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/p5-HTTP-Response-Encoding,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/128438 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128438
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
